drug_name: Suds High Foaming Antiseptic Hand and Body Wash
active_ingredients: Drug Facts Box OTC-Active Ingredient Section Chloroxylenol 0.3%
indications_and_usage: Drug Facts Box OTC-Indications & Usage Section for hand-washing to decrease bacteria on the skin
dosage_and_administration: Drug Facts Box OTC-Dosage & Administration Section wet hands and forearms apply 5 milliliters (teaspoonful) or palmful to hands and forearms scrub thoroughly for 1 minute and rinse
